jobs.title: VP, Partnerships
jobs.snippet: Reporting to the SVP, Customer Success and Partnerships you will manage our business plans for alliances and channel, develop close partner relationships, orchestrate cross-functional execution, and drive business success while managing the BD team.

jobs.title: Strategic Partnerships Director
jobs.snippet: Own the ERP Strategy: Build and execute strategic plans for over 300 potential ERP partnerships while constantly scouting the market for new prospects.
jobs.fullDescription: What we’re looking for: The "Hunter" Mentality: A strong sense of urgency, a bias for action, and at least 7+ years of experience in enterprise sales, partner development, or alliance management. Fintech & Financial Acumen: Deep experience developing complex financial models, including net interchange share, transaction/software fees, and customer acquisition models. Relationship Mastery: A natural ability to build trust with C-suite decision-makers and bridge the gap between business needs and technical solutions. Cross-Functional Leadership: Proven success leading business reviews and coordinating across Product, Marketing, Legal, and Onboarding teams. Strategic Problem Solving: Expert at interpreting business challenges and translating them into optimal process recommendations that scale. Persuasive Communication: Ability to present complex concepts clearly and convincingly to any audience. Market Expertise: Skilled at assessing channel opportunities and building strategies that expand leadership presence in the market. Technical Credibility: Technically capable of demonstrating AvidXchange solutions and understanding how they integrate with potential partners’ pain points. Educational Background: University degree or equivalent experience; an MBA is preferred. About AvidXchange AvidXchange is a leading provider of accounts payable (“AP”) automation software and payment solutions for middle-market businesses and their suppliers. By trade, we are a technology company, but if you ask anyone who works here, they’ll tell you our people are at the core of who we are. At AvidXchange, mindset is everything . We are Connected as People , Growth Minded , and Customer Obsessed . These three mindsets represent our culture – who we are, who we’ve always been, and they guide us to improve every day. Since our founding in 2000 in Charlotte, NC, we’ve created a company of over 1,500 teammates working across the U.S., or remotely. AvidXchange is proud to be Certified™ as a Great Place to Work ®. The prestigious recognition is based on anonymous data from our teammates and makes official what our teammates have known for years – that AvidXchange is a Great Place to Work®. Who you are: A go-getter with an entrepreneurial mindset – that means you are not afraid of taking risks, winning big or facing the unknown. Someone who understands that business is people centric. Connecting with others as humans first allows you to develop mutually beneficial working relationships. Focused on making a difference for our customers. AvidXchange exists to help solve complex problems for our customers so we can all realize our potential. What you’ll get: AvidXchange teammates (we call them AvidXers) get the perks and prestige of a growing tech company paired with the flexibility of a founder-led startup. We help our AvidXers develop as professionals and as human beings, providing work/life balance, development programs, and competitive benefits. At AvidXchange, we are building

jobs.title: Customer Success Director
jobs.snippet: Maven is seeking a Customer Success Director to lead our most strategic and complex client partnerships. This is a senior individual contributor role where you will act as a trusted advisor to VP-level Benefits leaders.
jobs.fullDescription: Jobs at Maven Clinic Current openings at Maven Clinic Thank you for your interest in Maven Clinic! Please note that Maven Clinic interview requests and job offers only originate from an @mavenclinic.com email address (e.g jsmith@mavenclinic.com ). Maven Clinic will also never ask for bank account information (routing, account numbers), social security numbers, passwords or any other sensitive information to be delivered over email, or phone. If you want to report a scam by someone impersonating Maven Clinic or a security issue involving Maven Clinic, please notify us at: security@mavenclinic.com . For general and additional inquiries, please contact us at careers@mavenclinic.com . If you're interested in joining our provider network, please see here for more information.
